name: Elfman (Edolas)
description: Elfman (Edolas) is a member of the Edolas Fairy Tail Guild. He is the Edolas counterpart of Elfman. He is very weak and sensitive person, to the extent that when he was lectured on becoming stronger by Jet (Edolas) and Droy (Edolas), he cries over how weak he is. His sister Lisanna (Edolas) often speaks for him. He uses a giant magic hammer in the battle.
